titleStmt.title: SII 41.376: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 376. (A.R. No. 591 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the goddess temple in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

p.hi: Kongu Sundara Pāṇḍya, Year 27 = c. 14th century.

summary.p: Gift of money for a lamp by the ūrār of the village. The money was obtained by selling the paddy belonging to the shrine of the goddess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tiru nalliyāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu taittiṅkaḷ mutal kuṟuppuṉāṭṭu vicaiyaṉ maṅkalattāḷuṭaiyār tiruṉākiśvaramuṭaiyār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattāḷuṭai ṉācciyār śrīpaṇṭārattil nelviṟṟu Ūrār tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku
Oṭukkiṉa paṇam nūṟṟunāṟpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭomikkoyiṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śiva brāhmaṇaril māṭala gotrattu vetaṉśivajñānapaṇṭitaṉu māṭalagotrattup piḷḷaiyāḻvi vāḻavantāṉum Ātrayagotrattu caṅkātinampi maṉṉiyappaṉum Immūvarum Ivviḷakku muṭṭil paṭi
yiraṭṭi Erippatākavum Itu mikamuṭṭil teṇṭamiṟuppatākavum Itucantrādityavarai kuṭaṅkoṭu koyil pukuvāṉ Erippatākavum Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 41.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
